# centers

**Type Property**

An option to place graph nodes at the center of each polygon in the generated mesh.

## Declaration

```swift
static var centers: GKMeshGraphTriangulationMode { get }
```

## Constants

- **vertices**: An option to place graph nodes at each vertex in the generated mesh.
- **edgeMidpoints**: An option to place graph nodes at the midpoint of each in the generated mesh.

items.description: An option to place graph nodes at each vertex in the generated mesh.
